message:
Update indexer and deployment pages

- Refactor indexer module
- Update lib.rs exports
- Improve config_input and deploy_cloudflare pages
- Update CLI index tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,6 +58,10 @@ pub struct IndexOptions {
     pub watch_once_paths: Option<Vec<PathBuf>>,
     pub db_path: PathBuf,
     pub data_dir: PathBuf,
+    /// Build semantic vector index after text indexing.
+    pub semantic: bool,
+    /// Embedder ID to use for semantic indexing (hash, fastembed).
+    pub embedder: String,
     pub progress: Option<Arc<IndexingProgress>>,
 }

             force_rebuild: false,
             db_path: data_dir.join("agent_search.db"),
             data_dir: data_dir.clone(),
+            semantic: false,
+            embedder: "fastembed".to_string(),
             progress: None,
             watch_once_paths: None,
         };

+            embedder: "fastembed".to_string(),

+        /// Embedder to use for semantic indexing (hash, fastembed)

         #[arg(long)]
         data_dir: Option<PathBuf>,
